title: PowerShell Extension Build Configuration
description: Configuration file for the PowerShell Chrome extension build & deploy script with pnpm support. All paths are resolved relative to run.ps1's directory.

$schema.description: Path to this schema file for IDE autocomplete

projectName.description: Display name for the project shown in console output

rootDir.description: Repo root. Used for git pull, root-level npm install, and standalone-script builds. Resolved relative to run.ps1.

extensionDir.description: Where the extension's package.json, manifest.json, vite.config.ts, and node_modules live. All Push-Location, pnpm install, pnpm run build, and .npmrc/.pnp.cjs writes target this directory. Use '.' when extension lives at repo root, or a sub-folder name when nested.

distDir.description: Build output folder, resolved relative to extensionDir. The deploy step copies <extensionDir>/<distDir>/ into the target browser profile.

buildCommand.description: Production build command, executed inside extensionDir

installCommand.description: Dependency install command, executed inside extensionDir

cleanPaths.description: Paths removed by -f / -r flag, resolved relative to extensionDir. Supports wildcards.

defaultProfile.description: Browser profile used when -pr flag is omitted

browserExePath.description: Optional override for the Chrome/Edge executable. Use for Chrome for Testing, Chromium, or custom browser installs. When empty, auto-detects based on -e flag.

chromeUserDataDir.description: Override Chrome user data directory. When empty, uses %LOCALAPPDATA%\Google\Chrome\User Data

edgeUserDataDir.description: Override Edge user data directory. When empty, uses %LOCALAPPDATA%\Microsoft\Edge\User Data

pnpm.description: Validate pnpm is installed (enables pnpm-specific code paths)

npm.description: Verify npm is available (deprecated, use pnpm)

prerequisites.description: Which prerequisites to check and auto-install

usePnp.description: Prefer pnpm Plug'n'Play. Auto-falls back to isolated linker on Node >= 24 or cross-drive stores

requiredPackages.description: Packages preflight checks for inside extensionDir/node_modules

standaloneArtifacts.description: Lists standalone-scripts/<folder> outputs the build verifies after compilation

baseDir.description: Root directory for standalone scripts, relative to rootDir

folder.description: Standalone script folder name (e.g., marco-sdk, macro-controller, xpath)

files.description: Required output files that must exist in standalone-scripts/<folder>/dist/
